_schema: DialogueProfile — one file per NPC dialogue context (id matches NPCNode.dialogueId).
_note: DM generates all dialogue dynamically; this file is context, not scripted lines.
initialContext: Injected only on first meeting (interactionCount === 0). Describe how this NPC behaves when encountering a stranger for the first time — default caution level, opening disposition, and any immediately observable traits.
defaultContext: Injected every dialogue turn. Describe the NPC's speaking style, current role, general disposition toward the player, and any persistent quirks the DM must always maintain.

milestones.label: Design note: what event does this milestone represent (not in prompt)
milestones.context: DM-facing context. What does the NPC know, feel, and intend in this situation?
milestones.permanentSummary: One-sentence summary for NPC long-term memory (required when isPermanent is true)
